entryPointCandidates.name: README.md
entryPointCandidates.summary: Minimal project README containing only the TEMO.AI title heading; serves as the repository entry-point document without further content.

entryPointCandidates.name: Program.cs
entryPointCandidates.summary: Application entry point that runs tool-detection guards, initializes Velopack auto-update, ensures Node.js availability, and bootstraps the WPF App.

entryPointCandidates.name: GenDialog.cs
entryPointCandidates.summary: Dialog for configuring an AI generation request (content type, game count, brand) and enqueueing it.

entryPointCandidates.name: TemplateGalleryDialog.cs
entryPointCandidates.summary: Gallery dialog for browsing, updating, deleting, and selecting site templates managed by the template store.

entryPointCandidates.name: ImagePromptCatalog.cs
entryPointCandidates.summary: Builds localized (Thai) OpenAI image generation prompts and alt-text for each image role, factoring in style, render, palette, and brand.

documentation.name: README.md
documentation.summary: Minimal project README containing only the TEMO.AI title heading; serves as the repository entry-point document without further content.

config.name: TEMO.AI.csproj
config.summary: MSBuild project file for the TEMO.AI WPF/.NET 9 Windows desktop app, enabling WPF and WinForms, importing AppVersion.props, setting the Program startup object, and referencing WebView2, SkiaSharp, Svg.Skia, and Velopack packages.

list.name: Presentation Layer
list.description: The main application windows (MainWindow split into feature partials and LoginWindow) plus shared WPF theme resources that compose TEMO.AI's primary desktop UI.

list.name: UI Controls & Dialogs
list.description: Reusable dialog windows and widgets (generation, image editing, project/template galleries, Vercel deploy flow) and the shared WPF UI helper utilities they all depend on.

list.name: Service & Business Logic Layer
list.description: The core engine of TEMO.AI: OpenAI content/CSS/image generation, layout/section composition, content and theme stores, project persistence/migrations, authentication, and Vercel deployment services.

list.name: Domain Models
list.description: Plain data structures describing the application's domain: components, sections, layouts, fields, image plans/styles, theme palettes, generation options, and prompt types consumed across services and UI.

list.name: Application Shell & Entry Point
list.description: WPF/.NET application bootstrap and startup wiring: the Program entry point, App lifecycle, global usings, and assembly/app metadata that initialize the desktop process.

list.name: Build, Configuration & Tooling
list.description: MSBuild project and version configuration, the project README, Velopack release/build and Node.js install scripts, and repository tooling settings that package and provision the app.

document:README.md.name: README.md
document:README.md.summary: Minimal project README containing only the TEMO.AI title heading; serves as the repository entry-point document without further content.

config:TEMO.AI.csproj.name: TEMO.AI.csproj
config:TEMO.AI.csproj.summary: MSBuild project file for the TEMO.AI WPF/.NET 9 Windows desktop app, enabling WPF and WinForms, importing AppVersion.props, setting the Program startup object, and referencing WebView2, SkiaSharp, Svg.Skia, and Velopack packages.

file:build-velopack.bat.name: build-velopack.bat
file:build-velopack.bat.summary: Windows batch release script that reads the version from AppVersion.props, runs dotnet publish as a self-contained single-file win-x64 build, then packs and optionally uploads a Velopack release to GitHub.

file:install-node.bat.name: install-node.bat
file:install-node.bat.summary: Small Windows batch helper that installs the Node.js LTS runtime silently via winget, exiting early if winget is unavailable.

file:.understand-anything/.understandign.name: .understandignore
file:.understand-anything/.understandign.summary: Ignore-list configuration for the Understand-Anything tooling, enumerating paths and patterns excluded from codebase analysis.

file:App.xaml.name: App.xaml
file:App.xaml.summary: WPF application definition markup declaring the Application resource root and merged theme dictionaries.

file:App.xaml.cs.name: App.xaml.cs
file:App.xaml.cs.summary: Application code-behind that runs the update check on startup and then shows the login window.

file:AppInfo.cs.name: AppInfo.cs
file:AppInfo.cs.summary: Static application metadata exposing the app name, assembly version, and a combined title-with-version string.

file:AppVersion.props.name: AppVersion.props
file:AppVersion.props.summary: MSBuild property sheet defining the shared application version number consumed by the build.

file:AssemblyInfo.cs.name: AssemblyInfo.cs
file:AssemblyInfo.cs.summary: Assembly-level attribute declarations such as theme info for WPF resource resolution.

file:Controls/AppUpdateDialog.cs.name: AppUpdateDialog.cs
file:Controls/AppUpdateDialog.cs.summary: Modal dialog that surfaces auto-update progress states (checking, downloading, applying, blocked) to the user.

file:Controls/ColorPickerDialog.cs.name: ColorPickerDialog.cs
file:Controls/ColorPickerDialog.cs.summary: Custom HSV color picker dialog with draggable saturation/value area, hue bar, alpha slider, and hex/RGBA format tabs.

file:Controls/GenDialog.cs.name: GenDialog.cs
file:Controls/GenDialog.cs.summary: Dialog for configuring an AI generation request (content type, game count, brand) and enqueueing it.

file:Controls/GenQueueWindow.Converters..name: GenQueueWindow.Converters.cs
file:Controls/GenQueueWindow.Converters..summary: Value converters used by the generation queue window for data binding (e.g., status-to-brush color mapping).

file:Controls/GenQueueWindow.cs.name: GenQueueWindow.cs
file:Controls/GenQueueWindow.cs.summary: Window that manages the AI generation job queue, rendering per-item stage progress, running jobs, and surfacing billing and error logs.

file:Controls/ImageEditDialog.cs.name: ImageEditDialog.cs
file:Controls/ImageEditDialog.cs.summary: Dialog for editing an image entry's source filename and alt text, with filename sanitization and public-path resolution.

file:Controls/ImageScrapeDialog.cs.name: ImageScrapeDialog.cs
file:Controls/ImageScrapeDialog.cs.summary: Dialog that scrapes images from a target web page via the network image scraper, presenting selectable preview cards for download into the project.

file:Controls/OriginalImgPickerDialog.cs.name: OriginalImgPickerDialog.cs
file:Controls/OriginalImgPickerDialog.cs.summary: Dialog that lets the user pick an original source image from the project folder or import new files from the computer, showing async-loaded thumbnails.

file:Controls/PreviewWindow.cs.name: PreviewWindow.cs
file:Controls/PreviewWindow.cs.summary: Lightweight window that displays a single image at full size with a titled header for previewing.

file:Controls/ProjectGalleryDialog.cs.name: ProjectGalleryDialog.cs
file:Controls/ProjectGalleryDialog.cs.summary: Gallery dialog listing existing projects as cards with search/filter, new-project badges, and delete actions for selecting a project to open.

file:Controls/PromptDialog.cs.name: PromptDialog.cs
file:Controls/PromptDialog.cs.summary: Reusable text-input prompt dialog supporting validation, input filtering, paste sanitization, and a max length.

file:Controls/SectionPickerDialog.cs.name: SectionPickerDialog.cs
file:Controls/SectionPickerDialog.cs.summary: Dialog for choosing a section definition, optionally via a two-step kind-then-variant selection flow.

file:Controls/TemplateGalleryDialog.cs.name: TemplateGalleryDialog.cs
file:Controls/TemplateGalleryDialog.cs.summary: Gallery dialog for browsing, updating, deleting, and selecting site templates managed by the template store.

file:Controls/TemplateUpdateProgressDial.name: TemplateUpdateProgressDialog.cs
file:Controls/TemplateUpdateProgressDial.summary: Small modal dialog that shows progress messaging while a template is updated from the remote source.

file:Controls/VercelDeploy/LoadingPanel..name: LoadingPanel.cs
file:Controls/VercelDeploy/LoadingPanel..summary: Reusable panel control that toggles between spinner, blank, empty, message, and content states for the Vercel deploy UI.

file:Controls/VercelDeploy/VercelDeployD.name: VercelDeployDialog.Logic.cs
file:Controls/VercelDeploy/VercelDeployD.summary: Logic partial of the Vercel deploy dialog handling team/project loading, login flow, deployment execution, and log streaming.

file:Controls/VercelDeploy/VercelDeployD.name: VercelDeployDialog.View.cs
file:Controls/VercelDeploy/VercelDeployD.summary: View partial of the Vercel deploy dialog that constructs the header, body, footer, action buttons, and collapsible log panel.

file:Controls/VercelDeploy/VercelDeployD.name: VercelDeployDialog.cs
file:Controls/VercelDeploy/VercelDeployD.summary: Core partial of the Vercel deploy dialog declaring its fields, deploy service, and busy-state management for in-flight operations.

file:Controls/VercelDeploy/VercelDomainD.name: VercelDomainDialog.cs
file:Controls/VercelDeploy/VercelDomainD.summary: Dialog for managing a Vercel project's custom domainsâ€”listing, adding, deleting, and showing DNS configurationâ€”plus a companion DNS-records dialog.

file:Controls/VercelDeploy/VercelProject.name: VercelProjectGrid.cs
file:Controls/VercelDeploy/VercelProject.summary: Static factory that programmatically builds the styled WPF DataGrid used to list Vercel projects, including header/cell/row styles, a rounded context menu, and templated domain-link columns.

file:GlobalUsings.cs.name: GlobalUsings.cs
file:GlobalUsings.cs.summary: Project-wide global using directives that import common namespaces into every C# file of the application.

file:Helpers/Ui.cs.name: Ui.cs
file:Helpers/Ui.cs.summary: Central UI helper library providing reusable WPF builders for brushes, inputs, dialog styling, buttons, image cards, thumbnails, and SVG/bitmap loading used across all dialogs.

file:Models/AiPromptType.cs.name: AiPromptType.cs
file:Models/AiPromptType.cs.summary: Enumeration defining the categories of AI content prompts (e.g., casino, lottery, slot) used by the prompt builder.

file:Models/ComponentManifest.cs.name: ComponentManifest.cs
file:Models/ComponentManifest.cs.summary: Data models describing a reusable site component manifest and its editable fields, including slot, variant, weight, and data binding metadata.

file:Models/FieldDef.cs.name: FieldDef.cs
file:Models/FieldDef.cs.summary: Data model defining an editable content field (key, label, type, grouping) consumed by the content store and prompt builder.

file:Models/GenerationOptions.cs.name: GenerationOptions.cs
file:Models/GenerationOptions.cs.summary: Options model carrying user-selected parameters for a content/image generation run.

file:Models/GenQueueItem.cs.name: GenQueueItem.cs
file:Models/GenQueueItem.cs.summary: Observable model representing a single generation-queue entry with status, progress, cost, and duration tracking for the queue window UI.

file:Models/ImageEntry.cs.name: ImageEntry.cs
file:Models/ImageEntry.cs.summary: Data model describing a single managed image (id, label, group, src/alt values, original source) for the image editing UI.

file:Models/ImagePlanItem.cs.name: ImagePlanItem.cs
file:Models/ImagePlanItem.cs.summary: Data model describing a planned image generation task (id, prompt, dimensions) produced by the image plan builder.

file:Models/ImageStyle.cs.name: ImageStyle.cs
file:Models/ImageStyle.cs.summary: Enumeration of supported AI image rendering styles (e.g., realistic, stylized).

file:Models/LayoutComponent.cs.name: LayoutComponent.cs
file:Models/LayoutComponent.cs.summary: Data model representing a placed layout component instance with its import paths, slot, variant, weight, and removability/variant flags.

file:Models/SectionDefinition.cs.name: SectionDefinition.cs
file:Models/SectionDefinition.cs.summary: Data model defining a section's metadata and component composition rules used by the section catalog and layout composer.

file:Models/ThemePalette.cs.name: ThemePalette.cs
file:Models/ThemePalette.cs.summary: Data model describing a theme color palette (primary, secondary, accent, background colors) used by the theme randomizer and CSS generation.

file:Program.cs.name: Program.cs
file:Program.cs.summary: Application entry point that runs tool-detection guards, initializes Velopack auto-update, ensures Node.js availability, and bootstraps the WPF App.

file:Services/AiCssGenerator.cs.name: AiCssGenerator.cs
file:Services/AiCssGenerator.cs.summary: Service that sends the current theme CSS and a reference image to OpenAI and applies the model-generated CSS variable overrides back to the project's theme file.

file:Services/AiImageGenerator.cs.name: AiImageGenerator.cs
file:Services/AiImageGenerator.cs.summary: Service that generates project images from an image plan via OpenAI, handling concurrency, moderation retries, promo/slogan assignment, composition, and saving results.

file:Services/AiPromptBuilder.cs.name: AiPromptBuilder.cs
file:Services/AiPromptBuilder.cs.summary: Builds OpenAI content-generation prompts by combining per-vertical prompt templates (casino, lottery, slot) with brand fields and formatting rules.

file:Services/AppUpdateService.cs.name: AppUpdateService.cs
file:Services/AppUpdateService.cs.summary: Startup service that uses Velopack with a GitHub source to check for, download, and apply application updates before the main window launches, showing an update dialog.

file:Services/AstroProjectSettings.cs.name: AstroProjectSettings.cs
file:Services/AstroProjectSettings.cs.summary: Service that edits a generated Astro project's settings JSON, notably disabling the Astro dev toolbar.

file:Services/AuthApiService.cs.name: AuthApiService.cs
file:Services/AuthApiService.cs.summary: HTTP client service that authenticates a user against the backend login API, sending hardware id and returning a token/role result.

file:Services/ComponentStore.cs.name: ComponentStore.cs
file:Services/ComponentStore.cs.summary: Service managing the catalog of reusable site components: listing definitions from local/seed roots, resolving slot selections, and copying component Astro/CSS assets into a project.

file:Services/CompositionCatalog.cs.name: CompositionCatalog.cs
file:Services/CompositionCatalog.cs.summary: Catalog and logic for randomly composing image character casts from grouped pools, selecting a main cast and assembling a full composition within size bounds.

file:Services/ContentStore.cs.name: ContentStore.cs
file:Services/ContentStore.cs.summary: Service that builds editable content field definitions from the project layout and reads/writes site config and FAQ data back to the generated project's source files.

file:Services/CssColor.cs.name: CssColor.cs
file:Services/CssColor.cs.summary: Utility for parsing and converting CSS color values, supporting hex/rgb parsing, hex/rgba formatting, and HSV conversion.

file:Services/CssStore.cs.name: CssStore.cs
file:Services/CssStore.cs.summary: Reads and writes the generated Astro project's styles/theme.css, extracting and updating :root CSS custom properties.

file:Services/GeneratedImageWriter.cs.name: GeneratedImageWriter.cs
file:Services/GeneratedImageWriter.cs.summary: Persists AI-generated images to the project's public folder as WebP, handling cover-resize, transparent button compositing, and registering entries in the images store.

file:Services/GenerationLog.cs.name: GenerationLog.cs
file:Services/GenerationLog.cs.summary: Accumulates a human-readable, thread-safe markdown log of a generation run (sections, prompts, blocks, errors) and saves it to the project.

file:Services/HwidService.cs.name: HwidService.cs
file:Services/HwidService.cs.summary: Generates and caches a per-machine hardware identifier in a temp file for licensing/identity purposes.

file:Services/ImagePlanBuilder.cs.name: ImagePlanBuilder.cs
file:Services/ImagePlanBuilder.cs.summary: Builds the list of image plan items that actually need generation by discovering image definitions and checking which tokens are referenced in the project's Astro/TS source.

file:Services/ImagePromptCatalog.cs.name: ImagePromptCatalog.cs
file:Services/ImagePromptCatalog.cs.summary: Builds localized (Thai) OpenAI image generation prompts and alt-text for each image role, factoring in style, render, palette, and brand.

file:Services/ImageRenderCatalog.cs.name: ImageRenderCatalog.cs
file:Services/ImageRenderCatalog.cs.summary: Catalog of realistic and stylized image render presets with weighted random selection helpers.

file:Services/ImageSizeCatalog.cs.name: ImageSizeCatalog.cs
file:Services/ImageSizeCatalog.cs.summary: Maps image role ids to their target width/height dimensions for generation and resizing.

file:Services/ImageStyleCatalog.cs.name: ImageStyleCatalog.cs
file:Services/ImageStyleCatalog.cs.summary: Large static catalog of image art styles (name + visual description) with random selection used to vary AI image aesthetics.

file:Services/ImagesStore.cs.name: ImagesStore.cs
file:Services/ImagesStore.cs.summary: Central store for the generated project's image manifest (lib/images.ts): reads/writes image entries, syncs game/SEO/promo image arrays, normalizes dimensions, and discovers definitions.

file:Services/Io.cs.name: Io.cs
file:Services/Io.cs.summary: Low-level file IO helper with UTF-8 read/write, resilient deletion with retries, recursive directory deletion, and an optional thread-static read/write caching session.

file:Services/JsonFile.cs.name: JsonFile.cs
file:Services/JsonFile.cs.summary: Generic JSON file read/write helper using System.Text.Json with case-insensitive and indented options, plus JsonObject variants.

file:Services/LayoutComposer.cs.name: LayoutComposer.cs
file:Services/LayoutComposer.cs.summary: Composes a randomized site layout by selecting shell and body section variants, copying components into the project, rebuilding the index, and repairing legacy sections.

file:Services/LayoutStore.cs.name: LayoutStore.cs
file:Services/LayoutStore.cs.summary: Reads and rewrites the generated project's pages/index.astro, parsing banner/component/import lines and rebuilding the section imports and BaseLayout body.

file:Services/LegacySectionRepair.cs.name: LegacySectionRepair.cs
file:Services/LegacySectionRepair.cs.summary: Detects and repairs legacy hardcoded section .astro files and stale index imports, replacing them with data-driven component definitions.

file:Services/LineCodec.cs.name: LineCodec.cs
file:Services/LineCodec.cs.summary: Encodes/decodes the line-based content and CSS exchange format used between the editor and AI, including markdown fence stripping and export id mapping.

file:Services/LoginRememberService.cs.name: LoginRememberService.cs
file:Services/LoginRememberService.cs.summary: Persists optional 'remember me' login credentials to AppData, protecting the password with Windows DPAPI (ProtectedData).

file:Services/NetworkImageScraper.cs.name: NetworkImageScraper.cs
file:Services/NetworkImageScraper.cs.summary: Drives a headless browser (Playwright/CDP core) to navigate a URL, auto-scroll, and capture all loaded image network responses into in-memory buffers with progress reporting.

file:Services/NodeInstallUi.cs.name: NodeInstallUi.cs
file:Services/NodeInstallUi.cs.summary: Shows a modal indeterminate-progress window while installing the Node.js runtime in the background, returning whether installation succeeded.

file:Services/NodeRuntime.cs.name: NodeRuntime.cs
file:Services/NodeRuntime.cs.summary: Detects, locates, and installs the Node.js runtime, probing availability, refreshing PATH, and running the bundled installer script.

file:Services/OpenAiClient.cs.name: OpenAiClient.cs
file:Services/OpenAiClient.cs.summary: HTTP client wrapper for OpenAI chat and image generation/edit endpoints with transient retry, usage tracking, and moderation/billing error detection.

file:Services/PaletteStore.cs.name: PaletteStore.cs
file:Services/PaletteStore.cs.summary: Provides a set of preset theme color palettes built from HSV values and a random palette picker.

file:Services/ProjectComponentSync.cs.name: ProjectComponentSync.cs
file:Services/ProjectComponentSync.cs.summary: Keeps a generated project's section components in sync with the active layout: copies missing components, removes orphaned section/css files, and rewrites the generated CSS import file.

file:Services/ProjectMigrations.cs.name: ProjectMigrations.cs
file:Services/ProjectMigrations.cs.summary: Runs idempotent migrations on an existing generated project, such as upgrading the SEO heading matcher in seo-content.ts and repairing legacy sections.

file:Services/ProjectPaths.cs.name: ProjectPaths.cs
file:Services/ProjectPaths.cs.summary: Central helper for resolving generated-project paths (src, public, index) and managing project markers like 'complete' and 'new'.

file:Services/PromotionCatalog.cs.name: PromotionCatalog.cs
file:Services/PromotionCatalog.cs.summary: Static data catalog holding a large fixed array of promotional copy snippets, with a Pick helper that returns a random subset for site generation.

file:Services/PromptUsedStore.cs.name: PromptUsedStore.cs
file:Services/PromptUsedStore.cs.summary: Persists which catalog prompts have already been consumed (in a JSON file) so generated sites avoid repeating slogans/promotions, with atomic locked access.

file:Services/Rx.cs.name: Rx.cs
file:Services/Rx.cs.summary: Tiny regex helper providing a Wrap utility that replaces a captured middle group while preserving its surrounding capture groups.

file:Services/SectionCatalog.cs.name: SectionCatalog.cs
file:Services/SectionCatalog.cs.summary: In-memory cache and query API over the available section/component definitions sourced from ComponentStore, with lookups by kind/name and conversion to LayoutComponent.

file:Services/SeoSloganCatalog.cs.name: SeoSloganCatalog.cs
file:Services/SeoSloganCatalog.cs.summary: Static data catalog of SEO slogan strings with a Pick helper returning a random subset for generated site metadata.

file:Services/SettingsStore.cs.name: SettingsStore.cs
file:Services/SettingsStore.cs.summary: Thin key/value settings persistence for the app (OpenAI API key, last project path) backed by a JSON settings file.

file:Services/ShellSlot.cs.name: ShellSlot.cs
file:Services/ShellSlot.cs.summary: Defines the set of editable shell slots (header, banner, faq, pages) and resolves each slot name to its corresponding .astro file path within a project.

file:Services/SiteGenerator.cs.name: SiteGenerator.cs
file:Services/SiteGenerator.cs.summary: Top-level orchestrator that generates a complete website: copies a template, composes layout/theme, builds content via OpenAI, generates images and CSS, and writes the finished project.

file:Services/TemplateStore.cs.name: TemplateStore.cs
file:Services/TemplateStore.cs.summary: Manages website templates: lists local and remote templates, downloads/replaces them from a remote zip, copies templates into new projects, and saves projects back as templates.

file:Services/ThemeRandomizer.cs.name: ThemeRandomizer.cs
file:Services/ThemeRandomizer.cs.summary: Applies a randomized color palette to a generated project's theme by rewriting CSS color variables, including derived rgba and darkened shades.

file:Services/ToolDetectionService.cs.name: ToolDetectionService.cs
file:Services/ToolDetectionService.cs.summary: Anti-tamper guard that scans for suspicious tools at startup and exits (or runs a delete script) if any are detected.

file:Services/TsBlockParser.cs.name: TsBlockParser.cs
file:Services/TsBlockParser.cs.summary: Lightweight parser for extracting brace-delimited blocks and quoted/array values from TypeScript/Astro source data files without a full parser.

file:Services/UsageTracker.cs.name: UsageTracker.cs
file:Services/UsageTracker.cs.summary: Accumulates OpenAI token usage per model and computes USD/THB cost totals, with parsers for chat and image usage payloads and a human-readable report.

file:Services/VercelApiClient.cs.name: VercelApiClient.cs
file:Services/VercelApiClient.cs.summary: HTTP client wrapper for the Vercel REST API: fetches scopes/teams and projects, manages custom domains, and checks domain DNS configuration.

file:Services/VercelAuthStore.cs.name: VercelAuthStore.cs
file:Services/VercelAuthStore.cs.summary: Reads the Vercel CLI authentication token from the known local auth file locations so the API client can authenticate.

file:Services/VercelCli.cs.name: VercelCli.cs
file:Services/VercelCli.cs.summary: Wraps the Vercel CLI as a subprocess: project create/link/deploy/logout and an interactive login flow, streaming output and extracting deployment URLs.

file:Services/VercelDeployService.cs.name: VercelDeployService.cs
file:Services/VercelDeployService.cs.summary: High-level deployment coordinator bound to a working directory that loads teams/projects via the API and runs create/link/deploy through the CLI.

file:Services/VercelModels.cs.name: VercelModels.cs
file:Services/VercelModels.cs.summary: Record types modeling Vercel CLI/API results: CLI result, scope/project options, and domain add/action/DNS configuration outcomes.

file:Services/VercelNames.cs.name: VercelNames.cs
file:Services/VercelNames.cs.summary: Sanitizes and validates Vercel project names, enforcing allowed characters/length and providing live input filtering.

file:Services/Workspace.cs.name: Workspace.cs
file:Services/Workspace.cs.summary: Utility to locate a workspace directory by walking up ancestor directories until a relative marker path is found.

file:Themes/Generic.xaml.name: Generic.xaml
file:Themes/Generic.xaml.summary: WPF generic theme resource dictionary defining default control styles, brushes and templates shared across the application's custom controls.

file:Views/LoginWindow.xaml.name: LoginWindow.xaml
file:Views/LoginWindow.xaml.summary: XAML layout for the login window, defining the branded login form (username/password, remember checkbox, error banner and spinner).

file:Views/LoginWindow.xaml.cs.name: LoginWindow.xaml.cs
file:Views/LoginWindow.xaml.cs.summary: Code-behind for the login window: handles authentication via AuthApiService, remembers credentials, shows error banners with marquee animation, and opens MainWindow on success.

file:Views/MainWindow.Content.cs.name: MainWindow.Content.cs
file:Views/MainWindow.Content.cs.summary: MainWindow partial managing the content editing panel: builds editable fields per layout, FAQ groups with add/delete, and saving content back to the project.

file:Views/MainWindow.Css.cs.name: MainWindow.Css.cs
file:Views/MainWindow.Css.cs.summary: MainWindow partial managing the CSS variables editor: loads theme variables, builds per-variable rows with color preview/picker, and saves edits back to the stylesheet.

file:Views/MainWindow.CssAI.cs.name: MainWindow.CssAI.cs
file:Views/MainWindow.CssAI.cs.summary: MainWindow partial implementing the CSS theme flyouts: exporting/importing raw CSS and triggering AI-driven CSS generation from a banner image.

file:Views/MainWindow.Deploy.cs.name: MainWindow.Deploy.cs
file:Views/MainWindow.Deploy.cs.summary: MainWindow partial that opens the Vercel deploy dialog for the current project.

file:Views/MainWindow.Gen.cs.name: MainWindow.Gen.cs
file:Views/MainWindow.Gen.cs.summary: MainWindow partial that opens the generation dialog/queue to start AI content and image generation.

file:Views/MainWindow.Images.cs.name: MainWindow.Images.cs
file:Views/MainWindow.Images.cs.summary: MainWindow partial managing the images panel: builds image cards, handles drag-and-drop, promo image add/remove, scraping, editing, and WebP conversion.

file:Views/MainWindow.Keywords.cs.name: MainWindow.Keywords.cs
file:Views/MainWindow.Keywords.cs.summary: MainWindow partial managing the SEO keywords panel: building keyword rows per page, brand-name tracking, and persisting keywords.

file:Views/MainWindow.Layout.cs.name: MainWindow.Layout.cs
file:Views/MainWindow.Layout.cs.summary: MainWindow partial managing the layout composition panel: loading layout/shell components, adding/changing/deleting sections, undo state capture, and saving the layout index.

file:Views/MainWindow.OpenAi.cs.name: MainWindow.OpenAi.cs
file:Views/MainWindow.OpenAi.cs.summary: MainWindow partial providing the shared OpenAI integration: model resolution, API key management, request execution, and the AI loading/error overlay.

file:Views/MainWindow.Panels.cs.name: MainWindow.Panels.cs
file:Views/MainWindow.Panels.cs.summary: MainWindow partial with small helpers to toggle and collapse the various editor flyout panels.

file:Views/MainWindow.Project.cs.name: MainWindow.Project.cs
file:Views/MainWindow.Project.cs.summary: MainWindow partial handling project lifecycle: creating new projects from templates, loading existing ones, saving templates with preview capture, and project switching.

file:Views/MainWindow.Server.cs.name: MainWindow.Server.cs
file:Views/MainWindow.Server.cs.summary: MainWindow partial managing the local Astro dev server: start/stop lifecycle, capturing process output, phase tracking, error reporting, and WebView navigation controls.

file:Views/MainWindow.Site.cs.name: MainWindow.Site.cs
file:Views/MainWindow.Site.cs.summary: MainWindow partial managing the site settings panel: site URL validation, QR generation, and persisting site config to site.ts, astro.config, and robots.txt.

file:Views/MainWindow.Unsaved.cs.name: MainWindow.Unsaved.cs
file:Views/MainWindow.Unsaved.cs.summary: MainWindow partial implementing unsaved-change tracking: editor state snapshots, undo history, autosave scheduling, and unsaved-changes confirmation on close.

file:Views/MainWindow.xaml.name: MainWindow.xaml
file:Views/MainWindow.xaml.summary: XAML markup defining the main application window layout: editor panels, preview WebView, toolbars, flyouts, and AI overlay used by the MainWindow code-behind.

file:Views/MainWindow.xaml.cs.name: MainWindow.xaml.cs
file:Views/MainWindow.xaml.cs.summary: Primary MainWindow code-behind: constructor/initialization, WebView setup, global key handling, project loading, content panel locking, and shared helpers used by all MainWindow partials.
